By utilizing the unboxed manufacturing method, the cheaper structural LFP (Lithium Iron Phosphate) battery packs, and the removal of physical driving controls, Tesla has driven the cost of production down to levels legacy automakers cannot fathom.
By removing the steering wheel, they have removed the human bottleneck from transportation.

Users will be able to summon a Cybercab just as they would an Uber or Lyft."},{"url":"https://eletric-vehicles.com/tesla/tesla-cybercab-production-shifts-to-steering-wheel-free-builds-drone-footage-shows/","title":"Tesla Cybercab Production Shifts to Steering-Wheel-Free Builds, Drone Footage Shows","content":"“Something big has changed at Giga Texas with Cybercab production,” Tegtmeyer wrote, adding that he expects “many more starting on Monday, 4/20.”

Volume production is set to begin in April, as Musk reiterated during Tesla’s latest earnings call in January.
